children.heading: .—Authorization To Reimburse
children.label: a .—Authorization To Reimburse
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out a program under which a member of the Coast Guard may be reimbursed, as provided in this section, for qualifying adoption expenses incurred by the member in the adoption of a child under 18 years of age.

children.heading: .—Adoptions Covered
children.label: b .—Adoptions Covered
children.text: An adoption for which expenses may be reimbursed under this section includes an adoption by a single individual, an infant adoption, an intercountry adoption, and an adoption of a child with special needs (as defined in section 473(c) of the Social Security Act ()).42 U.S.C. 673(c)

children.heading: .—Benefits Paid After Adoption Is Final
children.label: c .—Benefits Paid After Adoption Is Final
children.text: Benefits paid under this section in the case of an adoption may be paid only after the adoption is final.

children.heading: .—Treatment of Other Benefits
children.label: d .—Treatment of Other Benefits
children.text: A benefit may not be paid under this section for any expense paid to or for a member of the Coast Guard under any other adoption benefits program administered by the Federal Government or under any such program administered by a State or local government.
Not more than $2,000 may be paid under this section to a member of the Coast Guard, or to two such members who are spouses of each other, for expenses incurred in the adoption of a child.

Not more than $5,000 may be paid under this section to a member of the Coast Guard, or to two such members who are spouses of each other, for adoptions by such member (or members) in any calendar year.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: f .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe regulations to carry out this section.

children.label: A
children.text: by an adopting parent for travel; or

children.label: B
children.text: in connection with an adoption arranged in violation of Federal, State, or local law.

children.label: A
children.text: public and private agency fees, including adoption fees charged by an agency in a foreign country;

children.label: B
children.text: placement fees, including fees charged adoptive parents for counseling;

children.label: C
children.text: legal fees (including court costs) in connection with services that are unavailable to a member of the Coast Guard under section 1044 or 1044a of title 10; and

children.label: D
children.text: medical expenses, including hospital expenses of the biological mother of the child to be adopted and of a newborn infant to be adopted.

children.label: A
children.text: A State or local government agency which has responsibility under State or local law for child placement through adoption.

children.label: B
children.text: A nonprofit, voluntary adoption agency which is authorized by State or local law to place children for adoption.

children.label: C
children.text: Any other source authorized by a State to provide adoption placement if the adoption is supervised by a court under State or local law.
